title: leonurus globosus
intro: Leonurus globosus, also known as globe-lemon balm or lemon balm, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Globe-lemon balm is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
